dc:title: Cyclist on a shaded rural road beside a property sign
dc:description: A sunlit rural dirt or gravel road runs through a densely wooded area, forming a shaded tunnel of trees and foliage. At center-left, a person stands on the roadside facing the camera, wearing a sleeveless top, cropped dark trousers, socks, and shoes; the face is obscured or blurred. To the right of the person, a touring bicycle is leaned against vegetation and appears loaded with panniers, bags, and a cylindrical container. On the right side, behind a wire fence partially covered by ivy and dry leaves, a white sign reads "PROPRIETÀ UNIVERSITÀ AGRARIA DI ISOLA FARNESE." The scene has strong midday light with dappled shadows across the pale road surface and dense green vegetation surrounding the path.
